ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "case_no" INTEGER /* Case number assigned to each case */,
  "date_of_confirmation" TEXT /* Date of laboratory confirmation */,
  "date_of_onset" TEXT /* Date of onset of symptoms */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the case */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the case */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the case */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the case */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the case was admitted */,
  "case_classification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case classification */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms of the case */,
  "exposure_history" TEXT /* Exposure history of the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_case_classification_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_classification_id") REFERENCES case_classifications ("case_classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "hospital_type" TEXT /* Type of hospital (e.g., public, private, general, specialized) */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total bed capacity of the hospital */,
  "ventilator_capacity" INTEGER /* Total ventilator capacity of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_classifications" (
  "case_classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case classification */,
  "classification_name" TEXT /* Name of the case classification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_classification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_status" (
  "case_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case status */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., hospitalized, discharged, deceased) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_status_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_contacts" (
  "case_contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case contact */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "contact_address" TEXT /* Address of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_contacts_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_testing" (
  "case_testing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case testing */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, antibody) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_testing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_testing_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_symptoms" (
  "case_symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case symptom */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "symptom" TEXT /* Symptom of the case (e.g., fever, cough) */,
  "symptom_date" TEXT /* Date of the symptom onset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_symptom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_symptoms_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_exposure" (
  "case_exposure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case exposure */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "exposure_type" TEXT /* Type of exposure (e.g., travel, close contact) */,
  "exposure_date" TEXT /* Date of the exposure */,
  "exposure_location" TEXT /* Location of the exposure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_exposure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_exposure_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_transmission" (
  "case_transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case transmission */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., local, imported) */,
  "transmission_date" TEXT /* Date of the transmission */,
  "transmission_location" TEXT /* Location of the transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_transmission_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_sequencing" (
  "case_sequencing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case sequencing */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "sequencing_date" TEXT /* Date of the sequencing */,
  "sequencing_result" TEXT /* Result of the sequencing (e.g., genome sequence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_sequencing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_sequencing_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_vaccination" (
  "case_vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case vaccination */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine (e.g., Pfizer, AstraZeneca) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_vaccination_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
